title: Debug a Python Traceback
description: Analyze a Python error traceback and provide a clear explanation and fix.
prompt_body:
You are an expert Python engineer. Analyze the following traceback and:
1. Identify the root cause
2. Explain the error in simple terms
3. Provide a minimal fix
4. Suggest one improvement to prevent this in the future

Traceback:
{{input}}

title: System Design Breakdown
description: Break down a system design problem into components, tradeoffs, and architecture.
prompt_body:
You are a senior backend engineer. Given the following system design problem, provide:
1. Requirements (functional + non-functional)
2. High-level architecture
3. Key components
4. Tradeoffs
5. Scaling considerations

Problem:
{{input}}

title: Clean Up and Refactor Code
description: Improve readability, structure, and performance of given code.
prompt_body:
You are an experienced software engineer. Refactor the following code:
- Improve readability
- Reduce duplication
- Follow best practices
- Keep functionality unchanged

Code:
{{input}}

title: Generate API Specification
description: Convert a feature idea into a clean API contract.
prompt_body:
You are a backend engineer. Convert the following feature into an API specification:
- Endpoints
- Request/response schemas
- Validation rules
- Error handling

Feature:
{{input}}

title: Write a Technical Blog Post
description: Turn an idea into a well-structured technical article.
prompt_body:
Write a technical blog post on the following topic.
Include:
- Engaging intro
- Clear explanation
- Examples
- Conclusion

Topic:
{{input}}

title: Summarize a Complex Topic
description: Explain difficult concepts in simple terms.
prompt_body:
Explain the following topic in simple terms:
- Start with a high-level overview
- Break it into parts
- Use examples
- Keep it concise

Topic:
{{input}}

title: Generate Study Plan
description: Create a structured plan to learn a new skill.
prompt_body:
Create a study plan for the following goal:
- Duration: 4–8 weeks
- Weekly breakdown
- Key resources
- Milestones

Goal:
{{input}}

title: Extract Structured JSON from Text
description: Convert unstructured text into clean JSON format.
prompt_body:
Extract structured data from the following text.
Return ONLY valid JSON.

Text:
{{input}}

title: Rewrite a Professional Email
description: Improve tone and clarity of an email.
prompt_body:
Rewrite the following email to be:
- Clear
- Professional
- Concise

Email:
{{input}}

title: Generate Startup Ideas
description: Brainstorm realistic and interesting startup concepts.
prompt_body:
Generate 5 startup ideas in the following domain.
For each:
- Problem
- Solution
- Target users

Domain:
{{input}}

title: Generate Interview Questions
description: Create relevant interview questions for a role.
prompt_body:
Generate 10 interview questions for the following role.
Include a mix of behavioral and technical.

Role:
{{input}}

title: Feature Requirements Breakdown
description: Convert a feature idea into clear requirements.
prompt_body:
Break down the following feature into:
- User stories
- Acceptance criteria
- Edge cases

Feature:
{{input}}

title: Content Idea Generator
description: Generate engaging content ideas for a niche.
prompt_body:
Generate 10 content ideas for the following niche.
Make them engaging and shareable.

Niche:
{{input}}

title: Pros and Cons Analysis
prompt_body:
Analyze the following decision:
- Option A
- Option B
Provide pros, cons, and recommendation.

Decision:
{{input}}

title: Resume Bullet Improver
description: Enhance resume bullets to be impactful.
prompt_body:
Improve the following resume bullet points:
- Make them concise
- Add impact
- Use strong action verbs

Bullets:
{{input}}
